{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220744146F34EBB35FBC86864A7D"}"},"total":720},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7399859394761900862","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"推荐推荐~
这本没有过多的套路和水文，写的节奏也很好，某些地方还有点搞笑，会冲淡恐怖的氛围哈哈哈，不让人那么害怕，恐怖的地方写的也不错，有画面感也有代入感，可以冲~
作者加油加油不要烂尾"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722917686,"group_id":"7369483448517413950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2NGdxz0/VtHH3XpKzeOAld8kjobURqd1hUFDy5L+EVD","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1198886485500717","user_name":"用户11988864"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1198886485500717","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369483448517413950","book_info":{"abstract":"【无cp，无女主，不怎么爽文，第一人称，微微慢热，不介意的可以多给点耐心，新书《十卦九不准》是本书的第二部】
我叫隋小天，是个引路人。
但我只给横死的人引路。
横死属于恶业招致的恶果，死后大庙不收，小庙不留，沦为孤魂野鬼滞留人间，只能找到替身之后才能脱离禁锢。
比如那些淹死人的地方，每年都会再淹死人，跳过楼的地方，每年都会有新的跳楼的人，出过车祸致人丧生的路段就更容易出车祸。
我在梦里遇到过形形色色横死的人，我也因为这个能力得以进入玄门，见到了另外一个世界。
现在，我把我和那些横死之人的故事讲给你听。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2b735d0342463bc3a8d829dd4049c0ac","author":"秦塞人烟","author_id":"","book_id":"7369483448517413950","book_name":"灵路诡谭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7369483816441741886","read_count":"24916","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1182005"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"531","tags":"悬疑脑洞,灵异,无女主,群像,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/20240f98f7379347a57dc9854d08b7ba~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320654&x-signature=2KeIB3mhr%2ByJzuapQw%2BsgJHuRgU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6012002982","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220744146F34EBB35FBC86864A7D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9224,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10884,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8039},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1722921065,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572548083248349977","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看，无cp不暧昧不开黄腔，没有玉手玉足这类看着就倒胃口的描写，作者文笔很好，世界观很大，该填的坑和伏笔都能一一对应上，一些编出来的理论也很真实，本书大概算是群像吧，所有人都在的时候没觉得有什么，直到后面物是人非才发现每个人都很重要，反差太大也太痛了，好在是开放式结局，我们喜欢的人物还有存在的可能，我很喜欢这种飘着淡淡的幽默感的书，很缓和气氛，有恐怖描写不过胆小一点的也可以看，算是恐怖小说里很好看的一档了，最后我真的很想rua周三哥和周二哥，毛茸茸天下第一[注意]","text_exts":[{"e":202,"s":198,"text":"恐怖小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177413665486864A7D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227572548083248349977%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227369483448517413950%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763123353,"group_id":"7369483448517413950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4rXm5zr2ptOIs30Hhf469U=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d8a6c64a3a9e4b829cb362f8a6db8a57~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706134&x-signature=YpO8Nvar%2BYuO1VyEL0hOYS9wM6E%3D","user_id":"460030599504567","user_name":"只想做一只黄毛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"460030599504567","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1744876417,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":2 但我只给横死的人引路。
横死属于恶业招致的恶果，死后大庙不收，小庙不留，沦为孤魂野鬼滞留人间，只能找到替身之后才能脱离禁锢。
